'''Harmae''' was a [[Warrior caste|warrior]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. A [[Subaltern]], he was [[Escalation|escalated]] to [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] by [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]] [[Nas Choka]] for his actions on [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]]. He was to be given a vessel of his own to command.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
